Replay a recorded NDJSON session file

Usage:
  mindspec agentmind replay [file.jsonl] [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help           help for replay
      --phase string   Filter replay to a specific phase (e.g., plan, implement)
      --spec string    Spec ID to replay (resolves via active docs root to specs/<id>/recording/events.ndjson)
      --speed float    Replay speed multiplier (1, 5, 10, or 0 for max) (default 1)
      --ui-port int    Port for web UI (default 8420)

Global Flags:
      --trace string   Write trace events to file (use - for stderr)
